description_long: This is a vintage coupe car with a boxy, elongated body and a high roof, reminiscent of early 20th-century automobiles like the Ford Model T. The car features a two-tone color scheme with a light blue lower body and a dark blue or black roof, complemented by black fenders and running boards. It has four large, spoked wheels with whitewall tires, and two spare tires mounted on each side near the front doors. The windows are rectangular and tinted, with three on each side, and the doors are equipped with classic chrome handles. The front of the car displays a prominent grille and round headlights, while the rear is simple and flat with a small window. The overall design suggests a sturdy metal construction with some visible chrome and rubber elements.
description: A vintage, boxy coupe car with a two-tone blue body, high roof, spoked wheels, and side-mounted spare tires, evoking early 20th-century automotive design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the left profile, three windows, two doors, and a spare tire mounted near the front fender.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the flat back, small rear window, and wide rear fenders.
description_view_2: Side view of the right profile, mirroring the left with three windows, two doors, and a spare tire.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the grille, round headlights, and the curvature of the front fenders.
